questions.q: According to reports on May 13, 2026, grocery prices saw their biggest one-month jump in nearly four years. Which specific grocery category was reported to be 44% higher than three months prior?
A lawsuit reported on May 13, 2026, alleges that an Oregon teenager tragically died of sepsis due to what medical error before receiving stitches?
options: Doctors failed to clean the wound
A nurse administered the wrong blood type
An anesthesiologist gave a lethal dose
A surgeon left a sponge in his abdomen
questions.correctText: Doctors failed to clean the wound

questions.q: Jason Collins, who made history as the NBA's first openly gay active player, tragically died at age 47 in May 2026 from what illness?
On May 13, 2026, Arizona Sheriff Chris Nanos provided an optimistic update, saying investigators are closer to solving the disappearance case of which 84-year-old woman?
Alphabet's AI-driven drug discovery firm, Isomorphic Labs, announced on May 13, 2026, that it raised $2.1 billion in a funding round led by which venture capital firm?
